mapper.select:
SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE, T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, T.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS AS STATUS, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, T.ZERO1_MODEL AS ZERO1_MODEL, T.ZERO1_ENTROPY AS ZERO1_ENTROPY, CASE WHEN T.TICKET_TYPE = 'PF' THEN ( SELECT T2.SYSNAMEA FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_cable_mst T2 WHERE T2.TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID ORDER BY T2.TICKET_CABLE_ID LIMIT 1 ) ELSE AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA END AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, CASE WHEN T.TICKET_TYPE = 'PF' THEN ( SELECT T2.SYSNAMEZ FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_cable_mst T2 WHERE T2.TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID ORDER BY T2.TICKET_CABLE_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE COALESCE(AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA) END AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA AS ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA AS ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ, nodea.ip_addr AS ip_addra, nodez.ip_addr AS ip_addrz, CASE WHEN ( SELECT count(*) AS count FROM resource.tb_backbone_link WHERE src_node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA AND dest_node_id =AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ ) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_backbone, CASE WHEN ( SELECT count(*) FROM resource.tb_user_organ WHERE node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA ) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_organ_link, CASE WHEN ( SELECT count(*) FROM resource.tb_user_organ WHERE nren_name = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ ) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_organ_system, cnt.child_count FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select t.ticket_id, ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ from rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T inner join ( SELECT AL_ID.ticket_id, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, max(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current WHERE 1=1
AND insert_time > now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
GROUP BY ticket_id ) AL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL on al.ticket_id = al_id.ticket_id and AL.ticket_al_id = AL_ID.ticket_al_id ) al on t.ticket_id = al.ticket_id where 1=1
AND t.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
) al on t.ticket_id = al.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nodea ON nodea.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEfT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nodez ON nodea.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_cnt cnt ON T.ticket_id = cnt.ticket_id WHERE 1=1
AND T.OCCUR = TRUE AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND ticket_generation_time > now() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
AND t.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}
ORDER BY ticket_generation_time DESC, ticket_id desc

WITH sub_ticket_alarm AS ( SELECT T.*, AL.ticket_al_id, AL.root_cause_alarm_noa, AL.root_cause_alarm_noz FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUB_AL.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SUB_AL.TICKET_ID ORDER BY TICKET_AL_ID DESC) AS ORDER_NUM FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_AL_CURRENT SUB_AL ) AL ON T.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID AND AL.ORDER_NUM = 1 ) SELECT T.ALARMNO AS ALARMNO, T.CLUSTERNO AS CLUSTERNO, T.TMP_CLUSTER_NO AS TMP_CLUSTER_NO, T.SYSNAME AS SYSNAME, T.EQUIPTYPE AS EQUIPTYPE, T.ALARMTIME AS ALARMTIME, T.RECEIVETIME AS RECEIVETIME, T.ALARMLOC AS ALARMLOC, T.ALARMMSG AS ALARMMSG, T.UNIT AS UNIT, T.ALARMLEVEL AS ALARMLEVEL, T.CLUSTERNO_ORIGINAL AS CLUSTERNO_ORIGINAL, T.CLEARTIME AS CLEARTIME, T.PTPNAME AS PTPNAME, T.SLOT AS SLOT, T.PORT AS PORT, CASE WHEN ta.root_cause_alarm_noa IS NULL AND ta.root_cause_alarm_noz IS NULL THEN true ELSE false END RELATED_ALARM FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst T LEFT OUTER JOIN sub_ticket_alarm ta ON T.clusterno = ta.cluster_no
T.CLUSTERNO = #{CLUSTERNO}

SELECT tc.ticket_id, tc.fault_time, CASE WHEN tc.status = 'AUTO_FIN' THEN tc.ticket_update_time ELSE sop.handling_fin_time END AS handling_fin_time, tc.ticket_rca_result_dtl_code, tc.status , ta.root_cause_sysnamea, ta.root_cause_porta, ta.root_cause_sysnamez, ta.root_cause_portz, tc.parent_ticket_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current tc INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current ta ON tc.ticket_id = ta.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN nia.tb_sop sop ON tc.ticket_id = sop.ticket_id WHERE 1=1
AND tc.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}

SELECT pfm.sysname, pfm.port, pfm.unit, pfm.tmper, pfm.rxcur, pfm.rxmin, pfm.rxmax, pfm.rxave, pfm.txcur, pfm.txmin, pfm.txmax, pfm.txave, pfm.ocrtime FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current tc LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_cable_mst cm ON tc.ticket_id = cm.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN nia.tb_performace_mst pfm ON tc.fault_time = pfm.ocrtime AND ((cm.porta = pfm.port AND cm.sysnamea = pfm.sysname) OR (cm.portz = pfm.port AND cm.sysnamez = pfm.sysname)) WHERE tc.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} AND tc.ticket_generation_time > rca.fc_get_minus_day(30) AND pfm.ocrtime > rca.fc_get_minus_day(30)

SELECT trtr.routenum, trtr.sysname FROM nia.tb_roadm_trunk_repeater trtr WHERE trunk_id = (SELECT tcat.link_id FROM rca.tb_cluster_al_topology tcat WHERE tcat.alarmno = ( SELECT AL.root_cause_alarm_noa FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.ticket_id = T.ticket_id AND AL.ticket_al_id = ( SELECT max(ticket_al_id) FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current WHERE ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} ) WHERE T.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} ) )

SELECT '11213' AS ticket_id , 'INIT' AS status, 'ABNORMAL_TRAFFIC' AS alarm_type, '7' AS alarmlevel, TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as receivetime, TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as faulttime, R.STRRESNAME AS sysname, I.STRIFNAME AS interface_name, P.FLTBPSIN AS bpsin, P.FLTBPSOUT AS bpsout, P.FLTPPSIN AS ppsin, P.FLTPPSOUT AS ppsout FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF P LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE P.insert_time between '2021-11-22 10:58:00' and '2021-11-22 10:58:01' and R.STRRESNAME = 'jeju-n9k' and uo.NREN_ID = 'UO00000347'

SELECT DISTINCT #{TICKET_ID} AS ticket_id , 'INIT' AS status, 'ABNORMAL_TRAFFIC' AS alarm_type, '7' AS alarmlevel, TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as receivetime, TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as faulttime, R.STRRESNAME AS sysname, PM.if_id AS interface_id, I.STRIFNAME AS interface_name, P.FLTBPSIN AS bpsin, P.FLTBPSOUT AS bpsout, P.FLTPPSIN AS ppsin, P.FLTPPSOUT AS ppsout, CASE WHEN R.STRRESNAME LIKE '%-7712%' THEN '7712/5812' WHEN R.STRRESNAME LIKE '%-5812%' THEN '7712/5812' WHEN STRRESNAME LIKE '%-n9k%' THEN 'ngk' ELSE '' END AS equiptype, P.fltbpsin_anomaly, P.fltbpsout_anomaly FROM rca.tb_anomalous_traffic P LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID WHERE P.ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}

-- 2022-12-06 사용안함 SELECT '11214' AS ticket_id, 'INIT' AS status, 'BAD_TRAFFIC' AS alarm_type, '7' AS alarmlevel, DATEREGDATE as receivetime, DATEREGDATE as faulttime, STRRESNAME AS sysname, strprotocol AS protocol_num, STRS_IP AS src_ip, STRS_PORT AS src_port, STRD_IP AS dst_ip, STRD_PORT AS dst_port, strbytes_col AS byte_count, strcounts AS traffic_count FROM IP_YD.XE_SFLOW_LOG WHERE DATEREGDATE between '2021-11-22 13:49:52' and '2021-11-22 13:49:54' AND strresip = '116.89.161.14' AND strs_ip in ('211.114.64.142','211.114.64.17','211.114.66.79','59.18.30.17','59.18.30.76','59.18.35.211') AND strs_port in ('443')

SELECT #{TICKET_ID} AS ticket_id, 'INIT' AS status, 'BAD_TRAFFIC' AS alarm_type, '7' AS alarmlevel, DATEREGDATE as receivetime, DATEREGDATE as faulttime, STRRESNAME AS sysname, strprotocol AS protocol_num, STRS_IP AS src_ip, STRS_PORT AS src_port, STRD_IP AS dst_ip, STRD_PORT AS dst_port, strbytes_col AS byte_count, strcounts AS traffic_count, CASE WHEN STRRESNAME LIKE '%-7712%' THEN '7712/5812' WHEN STRRESNAME LIKE '%-5812%' THEN '7712/5812' WHEN STRRESNAME LIKE '%-n9k%' THEN 'ngk' ELSE '' END AS equiptype FROM rca.tb_noxious_traffic WHERE ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tl.id, snm.node_num AS snode_num, snm.node_nm AS node_nm, sn.id AS sdn_snode_id, spm.if_num AS sif_num, si.id AS sdn_sif_id, si.if_name AS sif_name , rnm.node_num AS rnode_num, rnm.node_nm AS rnode_nm, rn.id AS sdn_rnode_id, rpm.if_num AS rif_num, ri.id AS sdn_rif_id, ri.if_name AS rif_name FROM ip_sdn.tb_link tl INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_interface si ON tl.sif_id = si.id INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_interface ri ON tl.rif_id = ri.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst spm ON spm.if_id = lower(si.if_name) INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst rpm ON rpm.if_id = lower(ri.if_name) INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_node sn ON si.node_id = sn.id INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_node rn ON ri.node_id = rn.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst snm ON sn.id = snm.ip_sdn_id::INT INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst rnm ON rn.id = rnm.ip_sdn_id::INT WHERE spm.node_num = snm.node_num AND rpm.node_num = rnm.node_num ) k WHERE k.node_nm = 'jeju-5812' AND k.sif_name = 'xe5' AND k.rnode_nm = 'gwangju-5812' AND k.rif_name = 'xe5'
SELECT country_name AS name, iso_alpha2 AS code FROM gather.tb_country_code ORDER BY country_name COLLATE "ko_KR.utf8" ASC
select nren_name as name, nren_id as id from resource.tb_user_organ tcc ORDER BY nren_name collate "ko_KR.utf8"
SELECT port_num AS code , protocol AS name FROM gather.tb_default_port_number WHERE protocol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY protocol COLLATE "ko_KR.utf8"
mapper.insert: insert into nia.tb_ipsdn_handling_hist ( handling_time, ticket_id, user_id, result, handling_type, link_id, sourcedate ) values ( NOW(), #{TICKET_ID}, #{USER_ID}, #{RESULT}, #{HANDLING_TYPE}, #{LINK_ID}, to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
mapper.select: SELECT to_char(measured_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as measured_datetime, TRUNC(cpu_predicted::numeric, 3) * 100 as cpu_predicted, TRUNC(mem_predicted::numeric, 3) * 100 as mem_predicted FROM rca.tb_nodefactor_ai_result WHERE strresid = ( SELECT DISTINCT node_num FROM resource.tb_node_mst WHERE node_id = #{NODE}) AND measured_datetime = #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP

SELECT k.id AS id, k.snode_id AS snode_id, k.rnode_id AS rnode_id, k.usaged AS usaged, k.snode_num AS snode_num, k.snode_nm AS snode_nm, k.rnode_num AS rnode_num, k.rnode_nm AS rnode_nm FROM ( SELECT e.id, e.snode_id, e.rnode_id, e.usaged, n1.node_num AS snode_num, n1.node_nm AS snode_nm, n2.node_num AS rnode_num, n2.node_nm AS rnode_nm FROM ip_sdn.tb_e2e_node e INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst n1 ON e.snode_id = n1.ip_sdn_id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst n2 ON e.rnode_id = n2.ip_sdn_id ) k WHERE k.snode_nm = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA} AND k.rnode_nm = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ}

SELECT nm.node_num AS node_num, n.id AS sdn_node_id, nm.node_nm AS node_nm, TRUNC(nf.cpu_usage::numeric, 3) * 100 as cpu_usage, TRUNC(nf.mem_usage::numeric, 3) * 100 as mem_usage, nf.measured_datetime AS measured_datetime FROM ip_sdn.tb_nodefactor nf INNER JOIN ip_sdn.tb_node n ON nf.node_id = n.id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nm ON n.id = nm.ip_sdn_id::INT WHERE 1=1
AND nf.MEASURED_DATETIME > #{START_DATE}::timestamp
AND nf.MEASURED_DATETIME <= #{END_DATE}::timestamp
AND nm.NODE_NM = #{NODE}
ORDER BY MEASURED_DATETIME DESC

SELECT U.NAME , U.EMAIL , U.AGENCY_NAME
,U.ID , U.PW , U.LVL , U.LAST_LOGIN , U.PHONE_NUMBER
FROM nia.tb_user U
U.NAME LIKE '%' || #{NAME} || '%'
AND U.lvl & #{LVL_VALUE}!= 0
AND U.AGENCY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{AGENCY_NAME} || '%'
ORDER BY last_login desc
ORDER BY NAME desc
SELECT A.ID, A.PW, A.NAME, A.LVL, A.LAST_LOGIN , A.PHONE_NUMBER, A.email, A.AGENCY_NAME FROM nia.tb_user A where A.ID = #{LOGIN_ID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM nia.tb_user A WHERE A.ID = #{LOGIN_ID}
mapper.select:
SELECT seq, user_id, fault_gb, fault_type, reg_time FROM nia.tb_sop_code
AND user_id like '%' || #{USER_ID} || '%'
AND fault_gb like '%' || #{FAULT_GB} || '%'
AND fault_type like '%' || #{FAULT_TYPE} || '%'
AND reg_time > #{START_DATE}::timestamp
AND reg_time <= #{END_DATE}::timestamp
ORDER BY reg_time DESC
OFFSET #{OFFSET} LIMIT #{LIMIT}
LIMIT #{LIMIT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_sop_code ( user_id, fault_gb, fault_type, reg_time ) VALUES ( #{USER_ID}, #{FAULT_GB}, #{FAULT_TYPE}, now() )
mapper.select:
SELECT SOP.SOP_ID , SOP.TICKET_ID , SOP.TICKET_TYPE , CASE WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2' THEN '이상 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT' THEN '유해 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NFTT' THEN '장비 과부하 장애' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'FTT' THEN '비장애' ELSE '장애' END AS TICKETTYPE, SOP.TICKET_RESULT , SOP.STATUS , SOP.REQUEST_TIME , SOP.RECEIVE_TIME , SOP.DETAIL , SOP.fault_classify , SOP.fault_type , SOP.fault_detail_content , SOP.etc_content , SOP.ai_accuracy , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , NODEA.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRA , NODEZ.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRZ , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , TC.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_USER AS HANDLING_ACK_USER , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_TIME AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME , COUNT(1) over () totalCount FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, MAX(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current tac WHERE 1=1
AND tac.TICKET_ID LIKE '%' || #{TICKET_ID} || '%'
AND tac.insert_time > now() - INTERVAL '7' day
AND tac.insert_time >= #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND tac.insert_time <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
GROUP BY ticket_id ) AL_ID INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.ticket_al_id = AL_ID.ticket_al_id INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON AL_ID.ticket_id = TC.ticket_id INNER JOIN nia.tb_sop SOP ON SOP.ticket_id = AL_ID.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEA ON NODEA.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEZ ON NODEZ.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ WHERE 1=1
AND TC.TICKET_TYPE IN (#{TICKET_TYPE})
AND al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA}
ORDER BY SOP.request_time DESC
OFFSET #{OFFSET}
LIMIT #{LIMIT}

SELECT AL.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL
AND AL.TICKET_ID = #{TICKET_ID}::VARCHAR

SELECT fltbpsin, ROUND(fltbpsin_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_predict, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsin_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsin_threshold_lower, fltbpsin_anomaly, fltbpsout, ROUND(fltbpsout_predict:: NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_predict, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_upper::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_upper, ROUND(fltbpsout_threshold_lower::NUMERIC , 2) AS fltbpsout_threshold_lower, fltbpsout_anomaly FROM rca.tb_anomalous_ai_result a INNER JOIN resource.tb_port_mst p ON a.strresid = p.node_num AND a.strifid = p.if_num WHERE p.node_id= #{NODE} AND p.if_id = #{INTERFACE} AND measured_datetime = #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID, NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID, I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT, LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN, LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT, LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME, LT.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM AND NM.NODE_NM = #{NODE} AND I.IF_NAME = #{INTERFACE} AND LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP - interval '10 min' AND #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP + interval '10 min' ORDER BY LT.ID;

with dateregdate_data as ( select distinct dateregdate from ip_yd.xe_sflow_log where dateregdate between #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP - interval '1 hour' AND #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP + interval '1 hour' and ( dateregdate = #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP or dateregdate <= #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP - interval '5 min' or dateregdate >= #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP + interval '5 min' ) and strsenderip = ( select distinct strsenderip from rca.tb_noxious_traffic where ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} ) order by dateregdate ) select strresip, strresname, strs_ip, strs_port, strd_ip , strd_port, strs_mac, strd_mac, strprotocol, stripv4tos , strchannel, strsenderip, strin_interface, strout_interface , case when a.dateregdate = b.dateregdate then b.strbytes_col else '0' end strbytes_col , case when a.dateregdate = b.dateregdate then strcounts else '0' end strcounts , a.dateregdate AS collect_time from dateregdate_data a left outer join ( select * from ip_yd.xe_sflow_log where dateregdate = #{FAULT_TIME}::TIMESTAMP and strsenderip = ( select distinct strsenderip from rca.tb_noxious_traffic where ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID} ) and strs_ip = #{START_NODE} and strs_port = #{START_INTERFACE} and strd_ip = #{END_NODE} and strd_port = #{END_INTERFACE} ) b on 1=1
select category_cd, code_id, code_nm from resource.tb_code where category_cd = #{CATEGORY_CD}
mapper.insert: insert into resource.tb_node_mst ( node_num, node_id, node_nm, model_num, model_id, ip_addr, mac_addr, admin_yn, latitude, longitude, netconf_port, netconf_id, netconf_pw, netconf_type, chng_datetime, reg_datetime, data_source ) values ( (select resource.uf_generator_num('')), #{NODE_ID}, #{NODE_NM}, #{MODEL_NAME}, #{MODEL_NAME}, #{IP_ADDR}, #{MAC_ADDR}, #{ADMIN_YN}, #{LATITUDE}, #{LONGITUDE}, #{NETCONF_PORT}, #{NETCONF_ID}, #{NETCONF_PW}, 'netconf', NOW(), NOW(), 'web' )
mapper.update: UPDATE resource.tb_node_mst SET node_nm = #{NODE_NM}, model_id = #{MODEL_ID}, latitude = #{LATITUDE}, longitude = #{LONGITUDE}, mac_addr = #{MAC_ADDR}, ip_addr = #{IP_ADDR}, admin_yn = #{ADMIN_YN}, chng_datetime = now(), netconf_port = #{NETCONF_PORT}, netconf_id = #{NETCONF_ID}, netconf_pw = #{NETCONF_PW} WHERE node_num = #{NODE_NUM} and node_id = #{NODE_ID}
mapper.select: select row_number() over () rnum, *, count(1) over () as "PortTotalCount" from ( select distinct tpm.node_num, tpm.node_id, tpm.if_num, tpm.if_id, tpm.if_nm, tpm.if_index, tpm.if_type, coalesce(regexp_replace((reverse((regexp_match(reverse(tpm.if_nm), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), cast(cast(tpm.if_speed as bigint) / 1000000000 as bigint)::char) as if_speed, tpm.ip_addr, tpm.mac_addr, tpm.if_oper_status, coalesce(tpm.ip_prefix, ''), tpm.if_divistion, to_char(tpm.chng_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as chng_datetime from resource.tb_port_mst tpm where node_id = #{NODE_ID} order by if_oper_status desc, chng_datetime desc ) as port
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource.tb_port_mst ( node_num, node_id, if_num, if_id, if_nm, if_index, if_desc, if_type, if_speed, ip_addr, mac_addr, if_oper_status, ip_prefix, chng_datetime, reg_datetime, data_source ) VALUES ( #{NODE_NUM}, #{NODE_ID}, (select substr(resource.uf_generator_num(''),0,12)), #{IF_ID}, #{IF_NM}, #{if_index}::INTEGER, #{IF_DESC}, #{IF_TYPE}, #{IF_SPEED}, #{IP_ADDR}, #{MAC_ADDR}, #{IF_OPER_STATUS}, #{IP_PREFIX}, now(), now(), 'web' )
mapper.update: update resource.tb_port_mst set if_oper_status = #{IF_OPER_STATUS}, if_type = #{IF_TYPE}, if_speed = #{IF_SPEED}, ip_addr = #{IP_ADDR}, data_source = 'web', chng_datetime = now() where node_num = #{NODE_NUM} and node_id = #{NODE_ID} and if_nm = #{IF_NM}
mapper.select: select distinct pm.node_id--, pm.int_name from resource.tb_port_mst pm where not exists ( select 1 from resource.tb_backbone_link bl where bl.src_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.src_if_id = pm.if_id or bl.dest_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.dest_if_id = pm.if_id ) order by node_id

select distinct pm.node_id, pm.if_id , ip_addr , if_speed from resource.tb_port_mst pm where not exists ( select 1 from resource.tb_backbone_link bl where bl.src_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.src_if_id = pm.if_id or bl.dest_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.dest_if_id = pm.if_id ) and pm.node_id = #{NODE_ID} and if_oper_status = 'up' order by if_id

select distinct pm.node_id--, pm.int_name from resource.tb_port_mst pm where not exists ( select 1 from resource.tb_backbone_link bl where bl.src_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.src_if_id = pm.if_id or bl.dest_node_id = pm.node_id and bl.dest_if_id = pm.if_id ) and pm.node_id != #{NODE_ID} order by node_id
mapper.insert: insert into resource.tb_backbone_link ( src_node_num, src_node_id, src_if_num, src_if_id, dest_node_num, dest_node_id, dest_if_num, dest_if_id, src_ip_addr, dest_ip_addr, bandwidth, link_desc, vlan, tag, chng_datetime, reg_datetime, data_source ) values ( (select resource.uf_generator_num('')), #{SRC_NODE_ID}, (select resource.uf_generator_num('')), #{SRC_IF_ID}, (select resource.uf_generator_num('')), #{DEST_NODE_ID}, (select resource.uf_generator_num('')), #{DEST_IF_ID}, #{SRC_IP_ADDR}, #{DEST_IP_ADDR}, #{BANDWIDTH}, #{LINK_DESC}, #{VLAN}, #{TAG}, now(), now(), 'web' )
mapper.select:
select A.nren_id, A.nren_name, A.node_id, A.if_id as node_int, if.if_nm, coalesce(regexp_replace((reverse((regexp_match(reverse(if.if_nm), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), cast(cast(A.bandwidth as bigint) / 1000000000 as bigint)::char) as bandwidth, A.customer_id, A.email, row_number() over (ORDER BY nren_id) rnum, count(1) over () as "AgencyTotalCount" from resource.tb_user_organ A left outer join (select distinct node_id, if_id, if_nm from resource.tb_port_mst) if on if.node_id = A.node_id and if.if_id = A.if_id where 1=1
AND A.nren_name LIKE '%' || #{NREN_NAME} || '%'
AND A.node_id LIKE '%' || #{NODE_ID} || '%'
AND A.customer_id LIKE '%' || #{CUSTOMER_ID} || '%'
ORDER BY nren_id
OFFSET #{OFFSET}
LIMIT #{LIMIT}
-- select distinct node_id from resource.tb_user_organ tuo SELECT distinct node_nm AS node_id , 'IP' AS TYPE FROM resource.tb_node_mst ORDER BY node_nm ASC
-- select distinct if_id from resource.tb_user_organ tuo select distinct if_id, if_speed from resource.tb_port_mst where node_id = #{NODE_NAME} and if_oper_status = 'up' order by if_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource.tb_user_organ ( nren_id, nren_name, node_id, if_id, bandwidth, customer_id, email ) values ( #{NREN_ID}, #{NREN_NAME}, #{NODE_ID}, #{IF_ID}, #{BANDWIDTH}, #{CUSTOMER_ID}, #{EMAIL} )
mapper.update: update resource.tb_user_organ set nren_name = #{NREN_NAME}, node_id = #{NODE_ID}, if_id = #{NODE_INT}, bandwidth = #{BANDWIDTH}, customer_id = #{CUSTOMER_ID}, email = #{EMAIL} where nren_id = #{NREN_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource.tb_user_organ_ip (nren_id, nren_name, nren_ip) values ( #{NREN_ID}, #{NREN_NAME}, #{UPDATE_NREN_IP} )
mapper.select:
SELECT mapp_serial, port_num, ip_type, protocol, description FROM gather.tb_default_port_number
AND protocol IS NOT NULL
AND protocol like '%' || #{APP_NAME} || '%'
AND port_num like '%' || #{PORT} || '%'
ORDER BY protocol COLLATE "ko_KR.utf8" ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gather.tb_default_port_number ( port_num, ip_type, protocol, description ) values ( #{PORT_NUM}, null, #{PROTOCOL}, #{DESCRIPTION} )
mapper.select: SELECT mapp_serial , port_num , app_nm , description FROM gather.tb_port_app_mapp_mst
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource.tb_user_organ_ip ( nren_id, nren_name, nren_ip ) values ( #{NREN_ID}, #{NREN_NAME}, #{NREN_IP} )
mapper.select:
select profile_num, profile_title, profile_desc, network_type, processing_template, construction_check, auto_process_check, ticket_type, process_type, auto_recovery, email_check, to_char(auto_process_start_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as auto_process_start_datetime, to_char(auto_process_end_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as auto_process_end_datetime, to_char(chng_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') as chng_datetime, row_number() over (ORDER BY profile_num) rnum, count(1) over () as "ProFileTotalCount" from resource.tb_fault_process_profile where 1=1
and profile_title LIKE '%' || #{PROFILE_TITLE} || '%'
and network_type LIKE '%' || #{NETWORK_TYPE} || '%'
and processing_template LIKE '%' || #{PROCESSING_TEMPLATE} || '%'
ORDER BY profile_num
OFFSET #{OFFSET}
LIMIT #{LIMIT}
select distinct profile_num, node_id, count(1) over () as "ProFileRecoveryTotalCount" from resource.tb_fault_process_if where profile_num = #{PROFILE_NUM}
mapper.insert: insert into resource.tb_fault_process_if ( profile_num, node_id, chng_datetime, reg_datetime ) values ( #{PROFILE_NUM}, #{NODE_ID}, NOW(), NOW() )

insert into resource.tb_fault_process_profile ( profile_num, profile_title, profile_desc, network_type, processing_template, auto_process_check,
auto_process_start_datetime,
auto_process_end_datetime,
ticket_type, process_type, chng_datetime, reg_datetime, auto_recovery, email_check ) values ( #{PROFILE_NUM}, #{PROFILE_TITLE}, #{PROFILE_DESC}, #{NETWORK_TYPE}, #{PROCESSING_TEMPLATE}, #{AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK},
#{AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME}::timestamp,
#{AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME}::timestamp,
#{TICKET_TYPE}, #{PROCESS_TYPE}, now(), now(), #{AUTO_RECOVERY}, #{EMAIL_CHECK} )
mapper.update:
update resource.tb_fault_process_profile set profile_title = #{PROFILE_TITLE}, profile_desc = #{PROFILE_DESC}, network_type = #{NETWORK_TYPE}, processing_template = #{PROCESSING_TEMPLATE}, auto_process_check = #{AUTO_PROCESS_CHECK},
auto_process_start_datetime = #{AUTO_PROCESS_START_DATETIME} ::timestamp,
auto_process_end_datetime = #{AUTO_PROCESS_END_DATETIME}::timestamp,
chng_datetime = now(), auto_recovery = #{AUTO_RECOVERY}, email_check = #{EMAIL_CHECK}, ticket_type = #{TICKET_TYPE}, process_type = #{PROCESS_TYPE} where profile_num = #{PROFILE_NUM}
mapper.select: select resource.uf_generator_num('') as node_num
select resource.uf_generator_id('UO') as nren_id
select resource.uf_self_healing_profile_num('') as profile_key

select distinct ticket_type from rca.tb_rca_ticket_type_list where 1=1
and ticket_gb != 'SWITCH'
and ticket_gb = 'SWITCH'
select fail_type from rca.tb_rca_ticket_type_list where ticket_type = #{TICKET_TYPE}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT node_nm AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , 'IP' AS TYPE FROM resource.tb_node_mst UNION SELECT sysname AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , '전송' AS TYPE FROM nia.tb_equip_mst WHERE model != 'Utrans-6300p-H3' ) AS node ORDER BY ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA ASC

WITH sub_ticket AS ( SELECT * FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current ), sub_al AS ( SELECT AL.* FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, max(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current GROUP BY ticket_id ) AL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current) AL ON AL.ticket_al_id = AL_ID.ticket_al_id ) select T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE, T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, T.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS AS STATUS, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, CASE WHEN T.TICKET_TYPE = 'PF' THEN ( SELECT T2.SYSNAMEA FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_cable_mst T2 WHERE T2.TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID ORDER BY T2.TICKET_CABLE_ID LIMIT 1 ) ELSE AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA END AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, CASE WHEN T.TICKET_TYPE = 'PF' THEN ( SELECT T2.SYSNAMEZ FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_cable_mst T2 WHERE T2.TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID ORDER BY T2.TICKET_CABLE_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ END AS ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA AS ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA AS ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, AL.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ AS ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ, nodea.ip_addr AS ip_addra, nodez.ip_addr AS ip_addrz, cnt.child_count AS child_count FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T LEFT OUTER JOIN sub_al al on T.ticket_id = al.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nodea ON nodea.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEfT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nodez ON nodea.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_cnt cnt ON T.ticket_id = cnt.ticket_id WHERE T.OCCUR = TRUE AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS null and T.STATUS != 'AUTO_FIN'
and T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN != 'SWITCH'
and T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN = 'SWITCH'
and T.ticket_rca_result_dtl_code = #{FAILURETYPE}

SELECT 100 + row_number() over () AS INDEX, nm.node_id AS id , nm.node_nm AS device_name , nm.ip_addr AS ip_addr , '4' AS device_type FROM resource.tb_node_mst nm WHERE nm.node_id LIKE '%7712' OR nm.node_id LIKE '%5812' UNION ALL SELECT row_number() over () AS INDEX, em.tid AS id , em.sysname AS device_name , em.tid AS ip_addr , CASE model WHEN 'Utrans-6300p-H3' THEN '1' WHEN 'Utrans-6300p-V9' THEN '0' ELSE '2' END AS device_type FROM nia.tb_equip_mst em

SELECT 100 + row_number() over () AS id , bl.src_node_id AS source_name , bl.src_node_id AS source_id , bl.src_if_id AS source_port_disp , bl.dest_node_id AS target_name , bl.dest_node_id AS target_id , bl.dest_if_id AS target_port_disp , '1' AS status , '' AS equip_type FROM resource.tb_backbone_link bl INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst ns ON ns.node_id = bl.src_node_id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nd ON nd.node_id = bl.dest_node_id WHERE ns.node_id LIKE '%7712' OR ns.node_id LIKE '%5812' UNION ALL SELECT row_number() over () AS id , es.sysname AS source_name , es.tid AS source_id , tp.ptpnamea_bau AS source_port_disp , et.sysname AS target_name , et.tid AS target_id , tp.ptpnamea_bau AS target_port_disp , '1' AS status , tp.equip_type AS equip_type FROM NIA.tb_topology tp INNER JOIN nia.tb_equip_mst es ON REPLACE (tp.sysnamea,'-SH1','') = es.tid INNER JOIN nia.tb_equip_mst et ON REPLACE (tp.sysnamez,'-SH1','') = et.tid ORDER BY id

SELECT row_number() over () AS index , node.id , node.device_name , node.ip_addr , node.device_type , node.visible , coalesce(cast (node.fx as integer), 20 + (node.index * 80)) as fx , coalesce(cast (node.fx as integer), 20 + (node.index * 80)) as x , coalesce(cast (node.fy as integer), 100) as fy , coalesce(cast (node.fy as integer), 100) as y from (
SELECT DISTINCT ON (nm.node_id, nm.node_nm, nm.ip_addr) row_number() over () AS index , nm.node_num , nm.node_id AS id , nm.node_nm AS device_name , nm.ip_addr AS ip_addr , '4' as device_type , case when nm.admin_yn = 'W' then true else false end as visible , np.fx as fx , np.fy as fy FROM resource.tb_node_mst nm LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_position_info np ON np.node_id = nm.node_id AND np.topology_type = #{TYPE} where np.fx is not null
UNION SELECT distinct on (em.tid, em.sysname, em.model) row_number() over () AS index , null as node_num , em.tid AS id , em.sysname AS device_name , em.tid AS ip_addr , CASE model WHEN 'Utrans-6300p-H3' THEN '1' WHEN 'Utrans-6300p-V9' THEN '0' ELSE '2' END AS device_type , true as visible , np.fx as fx , np.fy as fy FROM nia.tb_equip_mst em LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_position_info np ON np.node_id = em.tid AND np.topology_type= #{TYPE} order by node_num ) as node

SELECT row_number() over () AS id, concat('link_', row_number() over ()) AS element_id, link.* FROM ( SELECT bl.src_node_id AS source_name, bl.src_node_id AS source_id, row_number() over (partition BY bl.src_node_id ORDER BY bl.src_node_id, bl.src_if_id) source_dir, bl.src_if_id AS source_port_disp, bl.src_if_id AS source_pau, bl.dest_node_id AS target_name, bl.dest_node_id AS target_id, row_number() over (partition BY bl.dest_node_id ORDER BY bl.dest_node_id, bl.dest_if_id) target_dir, bl.dest_if_id AS target_port_disp, bl.dest_if_id AS target_pau, 'UP' AS state, '' AS equip_type, '1' AS status FROM resource.tb_backbone_link bl INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst ns ON ns.node_id = bl.src_node_id INNER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nd ON nd.node_id = bl.dest_node_id WHERE bl.dest_node_id NOT LIKE '%control%' AND bl.dest_node_id NOT LIKE '%n9k%' UNION ALL SELECT es.sysname AS source_name, es.tid AS source_id, row_number() over (partition BY tp.sysnamea ORDER BY tp.sysnamea, tp.ptpnamea_bau) source_dir, tp.ptpnamea_bau AS source_port_disp, tp.ptpnamea_pau AS source_pau, et.sysname AS target_name, et.tid AS target_id, row_number() over (partition BY tp.sysnamez ORDER BY tp.sysnamez, tp.ptpnamea_bau) target_dir, tp.ptpnamea_bau AS target_port_disp, tp.ptpnamea_pau AS target_pau, 'UP' AS state, tp.equip_type AS equip_type, '1' AS status FROM NIA.tb_topology tp INNER JOIN nia.tb_equip_mst es ON REPLACE(tp.sysnamea, '-SH1', '') = es.tid INNER JOIN nia.tb_equip_mst et ON REPLACE(tp.sysnamez, '-SH1', '') = et.tid WHERE tp.sysnamez NOT LIKE '%control%' AND tp.sysnamez NOT LIKE '%n9k%' UNION ALL SELECT e2e.node_ida AS source_name, e2e.node_ida AS source_id, 1 AS source_dir, e2e.porta AS source_port_disp, e2e.porta AS source_pau, e2e.node_idz AS target_name, e2e.node_idz AS target_id, 1 AS target_dir, e2e.portz AS target_port_disp, e2e.portz AS target_pau, 'UP' AS state, '' AS equip_type, '1' AS status FROM nia.tb_e2e_topology e2e WHERE e2e.node_idz NOT LIKE '%control%' AND e2e.node_idz NOT LIKE '%n9k%' ) AS link;
mapper.insert:
DELETE FROM resource.tb_node_position_info WHERE topology_type = #{TYPE}; INSERT INTO resource.tb_node_position_info ( node_type, node_id, node_image_path, fx, fy, topology_type ) VALUES
( #{item.node_type}, #{item.node_id}, #{item.node_image_path}, #{item.fx}, #{item.fy}, #{item.topology_type} )
mapper.select:
SELECT sysDialog.alarmno, sysDialog.alarmtime, sysDialog.node_num, sysDialog.node_nm, sysDialog.alarmmsg, sysDialog.alarmlvl, sysDialog.etc, sysDialog.rule_id, sysDialog.alarmloc, CASE WHEN sysDialog.status = 'INIT' THEN '발생' WHEN sysDialog.status = 'FIN' THEN '마감' WHEN sysDialog.status = 'AUTO_FIN' THEN '자동 마감' ELSE '-' END AS status, nodea.ip_addr FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst sysDialog LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst nodea ON nodea.node_id = sysDialog.node_nm WHERE sysDialog.alarmtime > now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR
ORDER BY sysDialog.alarmno DESC

SELECT syslog_rule_id , syslog_rule_nm , occur_str1 , occur_str2 , occur_str3 , occur_except_str1 , occur_except_str2 , occur_except_str3 , CASE WHEN tsrm.use_yn = 'Y' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS use_yn FROM gather.tb_syslog_rule_mst tsrm WHERE 1=1
AND syslog_rule_nm like '%' || #{SYSLOG_RULE_NM} || '%'
AND (occur_str1 like '%' || #{OCCUR_KEYWORD} || '%' OR occur_str2 like '%' || #{OCCUR_KEYWORD} || '%' OR occur_str3 like '%' || #{OCCUR_KEYWORD} || '%')
AND (occur_except_str1 like '%' || #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_KEYWORD} || '%' OR occur_except_str2 like '%' || #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_KEYWORD} || '%' OR occur_except_str3 like '%' || #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_KEYWORD} || '%')
ORDER BY syslog_rule_id
mapper.update: UPDATE GATHER.TB_SYSLOG_RULE_MST SET SYSLOG_RULE_NM = #{SYSLOG_RULE_NM}, OCCUR_STR1 = #{OCCUR_STR1}, OCCUR_STR2 = #{OCCUR_STR2}, OCCUR_STR3 = #{OCCUR_STR3}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR1 = #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR1}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR2 = #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR2}, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR3 = #{OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR3}, USE_YN = CASE WHEN #{USE_YN} = '사용' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE SYSLOG_RULE_ID = #{SYSLOG_RULE_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT syslog_rule_nm, COUNT(*) FROM gather.tb_syslog_rule_mst WHERE syslog_rule_nm = #{SYSLOG_RULE_NM} GROUP BY syslog_rule_nm HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
SELECT node_nm FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst tsam WHERE tsam.alarmtime BETWEEN NOW()::TIMESTAMP - interval '30 day' AND NOW()::TIMESTAMP GROUP BY node_nm
SELECT DISTINCT alarmloc FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst WHERE alarmloc IS NOT NULL
SELECT MAX(alarmtime) AS "max" FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst

SELECT tatpd.self_process_no, tatpd.alarmno, tatpd.treat_gb, tatpd.feedback_time, tatpd.occur_time, tatpd.feedback_msg, tatpd.clos_type, tatpd.self_process_group, tatpd.self_process_type FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tatpd WHERE tatpd.self_process_group IN ('ST')

SELECT tatpd.self_process_no, tatpd.ticket_id, tatpd.ticket_type, tatpd.treat_gb, tatpd.feedback_time, tatpd.occur_time, tatpd.feedback_msg, tatpd.clos_type, tatpd.self_process_group, tatpd.self_process_type FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tatpd WHERE tatpd.self_process_group IN ('SO')
SELECT CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM occur_time) AS VARCHAR) AS year FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl GROUP BY year

WITH months AS ( SELECT generate_series(
DATE_TRUNC('year', TO_DATE(#{YEAR}::text, 'YYYY')::date), DATE_TRUNC('year', TO_DATE(#{YEAR}::text, 'YYYY')::date) + INTERVAL '1 year' - INTERVAL '1 day',
DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE), DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 year' - INTERVAL '1 day',
'1 month' ) AS hourly_time ) SELECT TO_CHAR(months.hourly_time, 'YYYY-MM') AS hourly_time, COALESCE(COUNT(tatpd.*), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE}) AND tatpd.clos_type = 'A' AND tatpd.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS COUNT FROM months LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tatpd ON DATE_TRUNC('month', tatpd.occur_time) = months.hourly_time
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
GROUP BY hourly_time ORDER BY hourly_time

WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series(
DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{MONTH}, 'YYYY-MM')::date), DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(#{MONTH}, 'YYYY-MM')::date) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day',
DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE), DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' - INTERVAL '1 day',
'1 day' ) AS hourly_time ) SELECT TO_CHAR(days.hourly_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hourly_time, COALESCE(COUNT(tatpd.*), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE}) AND tatpd.clos_type = 'A' AND tatpd.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS COUNT FROM days LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tatpd ON DATE_TRUNC('day', tatpd.occur_time) = days.hourly_time
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
GROUP BY hourly_time ORDER BY hourly_time

WITH hours AS ( SELECT generate_series(
DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE(#{DAY}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')::date), DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE(#{DAY}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')::date) + INTERVAL '1 day' - INTERVAL '1 hour',
DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE), DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 day' - INTERVAL '1 hour',
'1 hour' ) AS hourly_time ) SELECT TO_CHAR(hours.hourly_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS hourly_time, COALESCE(COUNT(tatpd.*), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE}) AND tatpd.clos_type = 'A' AND tatpd.clos_status = 'Y' THEN 1 END), 0) AS COUNT FROM hours LEFT JOIN nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tatpd ON DATE_TRUNC('hour', tatpd.occur_time) = hours.hourly_time
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
AND tatpd.self_process_group IN (#{SELF_PROCESS_TYPE})
GROUP BY hourly_time ORDER BY hourly_time

SELECT ticket_id, root_cause_sysnamea, root_cause_porta, root_cause_sysnamez, root_cause_portz FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current WHERE 1=1
AND ticket_id = #{TICKET_ID}

SELECT alarmno, alarmtime, node_num, node_nm, alarmmsg, alarmlvl, etc, rule_id, alarmloc, status FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst WHERE 1=1
AND alarmno = #{ALARMNO}
